name: :whale: A curated list of Docker resources and projects
description: :whale: A curated list of Docker resources and projects

links.title: Docker Compose
links.description: Define and run multi-container applications with Docker.

links.title: containerd
links.description: An open and reliable container runtime.

links.title: cri-o
links.description: Open Container Initiative-based implementation of Kubernetes Container Runtime Interface.

links.title: gVisor
links.description: Application Kernel for Containers.

links.title: lxc
links.description: LXC - Linux Containers.

links.title: podman
links.description: Libpod is a library used to create container pods. Home of Podman.

links.title: runc
links.description: CLI tool for spawning and running containers according to the OCI specification.

links.title: runtime-tools
links.description: Oci-runtime-tool is a collection of tools for working with the OCI runtime specification.

links.title: ansible-bender
links.description: A tool utilising `ansible` and `buildah`.

links.title: apko
links.description: Declarative OCI image builder from apk packages; reproducible by design.

links.title: buildah
links.description: A tool that facilitates building OCI images.

links.title: BuildKit
links.description: Concurrent, cache-efficient, and Dockerfile-agnostic builder toolkit.

links.title: buildx
links.description: Official Docker CLI plugin for multi-platform builds backed by BuildKit.

links.title: cekit
links.description: A tool used by openshift to build base images using different build engines.

links.title: dlayer
links.description: Docker layer analyzer.

links.title: docker-companion
links.description: A command line tool written in Golang to squash and unpack docker images.

links.title: docker-repack
links.description: Repacks a Docker image into a smaller, more efficient version that makes it significantly faster to pull.

links.title: earthly
links.description: Containerized build automation with Dockerfile-meets-Makefile syntax.

links.title: essex
links.description: Boilerplate for Docker Based Projects: Essex is a CLI utility written in bash to quickly setup clean and consistent Docker projects with Makefile driven workflows.

links.title: HPC Container Maker
links.description: Generates Dockerfiles from a high level Python recipe, including building blocks for High-Performance Computing components.

links.title: img
links.description: Standalone, daemon-less, unprivileged Dockerfile and OCI compatible container image builder.

links.title: ko
links.description: Build and deploy Go applications as container images without a Dockerfile.

links.title: nix2container
links.description: Build OCI images with Nix without `docker load` round-trips.

links.title: packer
links.description: Hashicorp tool to build machine images including docker image integrated with configuration management tools like chef, puppet, ansible.

links.title: Production-Ready Python Containers
links.description: :yen: A template for creating production-ready Docker images for Python applications.

links.title: RAUDI
links.description: A tool to automatically update (and optionally push to Docker Hub) Docker Images for 3rd party software whenever theres is a new release/update/commit.

links.title: runlike
links.description: Generate `docker run`command and options from running containers.

links.title: Whaler
links.description: Program to reverse Docker images into Dockerfiles.

links.title: Chainguard Images
links.description: Minimal, signed, SBOM-attested container images built on Wolfi.

links.title: distroless
links.description: Language focused docker images, minus the operating system.

links.title: melange
links.description: Build apk packages from declarative YAML for use with apko.

links.title: pglayers
links.description: Pre-built PostgreSQL extensions as composable Docker layers. 50+ extensions, ready-to-use combined images (full, Azure-compatible).

links.title: Wolfi
links.description: Undistro Linux designed for containers; glibc-based, signed, daily SBOMs.

links.title: Dockershelf
links.description: A repository that serves as a collector for docker recipes that are universal, efficient and slim. Images are updated, tested and published daily via a Travis cron job.

links.title: Trsuted Builds
links.description: Trusted Automated Docker Builds. Dockerfile Project maintains a central repository of Dockerfile for various popular open source software services runnable on a Docker container.

links.title: Dockadvisor
links.description: Lightweight Dockerfile linter with 60+ rules, quality scoring, and security checks.

links.title: docker-image-size-limit
links.description: A tool to keep an eye on your docker images size.

links.title: Hadolint
links.description: A Dockerfile linter that checks for best practices, common mistakes, and is also able to lint any bash written in `RUN` instructions;.

links.title: Amazon Elastic Container Registry
links.description: :yen: Amazon Elastic Container Registry (ECR) is a fully-managed Docker container registry that makes it easy for developers to store, manage, and deploy Docker container images.

links.title: Azure Container Registry
links.description: :yen: Manage a Docker private registry as a first-class Azure resource.

links.title: Cloudsmith
links.description: :yen: A fully managed package management SaaS, with first-class support for public and private Docker registries (and many others, incl. Helm charts for the Kubernetes ecosystem). Has a generous free-tier and is also completely free for open-source.

links.title: Container Registry Service
links.description: :yen: Harbor based Container Management Solution as a Service for teams and organizations. Free tier offers 1 GB storage for private repositories.

links.title: Cycle.io
links.description: :yen: Bare-metal container hosting.

links.title: DigitalOcean
links.description: :yen: DigitalOcean Container Registry.

links.title: GCP Artifact Registry
links.description: :yen: Fast, private Docker image storage on Google Cloud Platform.

links.title: Gitea Container Registry
links.description: Integrated Docker registry in Gitea, ideal for private, small-scale image hosting.

links.title: GitHub Container Registry
links.description: GitHub's solution for storing and managing Docker images, with tight integration into GitHub Actions.

links.title: GitLab Container Registry
links.description: Registry focused on using its images in GitLab CI.

links.title: JFrog Artifactory
links.description: :yen: Artifact Repository Manager, can be used as private Docker Registry as well.

links.title: kontain.me
links.description: On-demand container image registry that builds and serves images when they are pulled.

links.title: Kraken
links.description: Uber's Highly scalable P2P docker registry, capable of distributing TBs of data in seconds.

links.title: nscr
links.description: A light-weight, self-contained container registry that's easy to run and maintain.

links.title: Quay.io
links.description: :yen: Secure hosting for private Docker repositories.

links.title: Registryo
links.description: UI and token based authentication server for onpremise docker registry.

links.title: Sonatype Nexus Repository
links.description: Manage binaries and build artifacts across your software supply chain.

links.title: crane
links.description: Lightweight CLI to manipulate registry images, from `go-containerregistry`.

links.title: go-containerregistry
links.description: Go library and CLI tools (`crane`, `gcrane`, `registry`) for working with container registries.

links.title: regctl
links.description: Daemonless registry client; copy, inspect, modify, and sign OCI images.

links.title: skopeo
links.description: Work with remote image registries: retrieve information, copy images, sign content.

links.title: Anchor
links.description: A tool to ensure reproducible builds by pinning dependencies inside your Dockerfiles.

links.title: Anchor Enterprise
links.description: :yen: Analyze images for CVE vulnerabilities and against custom security policies.

links.title: BomLens
links.description: Scan container images (plus source, binaries, and firmware) into CycloneDX SBOMs with vulnerability, license, and notice reports. Ships as a single Docker image with a web UI.

links.title: Clair
links.description: Clair is an open source project for the static analysis of vulnerabilities in appc and docker containers.

links.title: Docker Scout
links.description: Official Docker CLI for SBOM generation, vulnerability analysis, and policy evaluation.

links.title: Grype
links.description: A vulnerability scanner for container images, filesystems and SBOMs.

links.title: oscap-docker
links.description: OpenSCAP provides oscap-docker tool which is used to scan Docker containers and images.

links.title: pindock
links.description: Pin and update Docker image digests in Dockerfiles and compose files.

links.title: Trivy
links.description: Aqua Security's open source simple and comprehensive vulnerability scanner for containers (suitable for CI).

links.title: in-toto
links.description: Framework for supply chain attestations; underpins SLSA and cosign provenance.

links.title: policy-controller
links.description: Kubernetes admission controller enforcing cosign signatures on container images.

links.title: witness
links.description: Generate and verify in-toto attestations across the build pipeline.

links.title: Composerize
links.description: Convert docker run commands into docker-compose files.

links.title: ctk
links.description: Visual composer for container based workloads.

links.title: kompose
links.description: Go from Docker Compose to Kubernetes.

links.title: plash
links.description: A container run and build engine - runs inside docker.

links.title: podman-compose
links.description: A script to run docker-compose.yml using podman.

links.title: Smalte
links.description: Dynamically configure applications that require static configuration in docker container.

links.title: CloudSlang
links.description: CloudSlang is a workflow engine to create Docker process automation.

links.title: docker rollout
links.description: Zero downtime deployment for Docker Compose services.

links.title: Mesos
links.description: Resource/Job scheduler for containers, VM's and physical hosts.

links.title: Nebula
links.description: A Docker orchestration tool designed to manage massive scale distributed clusters.

links.title: Rancher
links.description: An open source project that provides a complete platform for operating Docker in production.

links.title: Swarm-cronjob
links.description: Create jobs on a time-based schedule on Swarm.

links.title: Amazon ECS
links.description: :yen: A management service on EC2 that supports Docker containers.

links.title: Appfleet
links.description: :yen: Edge platform to deploy and manage containerized services globally; routes traffic to the closest location for low latency.

links.title: Azure AKS
links.description: :yen: Fully managed Kubernetes container orchestration service.

links.title: blackfish
links.description: A CoreOS VM to build swarm clusters for Dev & Production.

links.title: BosnD
links.description: BosnD, the boatswain daemon - A dynamic configuration file writer & service reloader for dynamically changing container environments.

links.title: caprover
links.description: [Previously known as CaptainDuckDuck] Automated Scalable Webserver Package (automated Docker+nginx) - Heroku on Steroids.

links.title: Cloud 66
links.description: :yen: Full-stack hosted container management as a service.

links.title: Cloud Run Compose
links.description: :yen: Deploy `docker-compose.yaml` files directly to Google Cloud Run as a managed service.

links.title: Convox Rack
links.description: Convox Rack is open source PaaS built on top of expert infrastructure automation and devops best practices.

links.title: docker-to-iac
links.description: Translate docker run and commit into Infrastructure as Code templates for AWS, Render.com and DigitalOcean.

links.title: doco-cd
links.description: Lightweight GitOps and Continuous Deployment tool to deploy Docker Compose projects and Swarm stacks using polling and webhooks.

links.title: Dokku
links.description: Docker powered mini-Heroku that helps you build and manage the lifecycle of applications.

links.title: Exoframe
links.description: A self-hosted tool that allows simple one-command deployments using Docker.

links.title: Giant Swarm
links.description: :yen: Simple microservice infrastructure. Deploy your containers in seconds.

links.title: Google Container Engine
links.description: :yen: Docker containers on Google Cloud Computing powered by [Kubernetes][kubernetes].

links.title: Grafeas
links.description: A common API for metadata about containers, from image and build details to security vulnerabilities.

links.title: Mesosphere DC/OS Platform
links.description: :yen: Integrated platform for data and containers built on Apache Mesos.

links.title: Red Hat OpenShift Dedicated
links.description: :yen: Fully-managed Red Hat® OpenShift® service on Amazon Web Services and Google Cloud.

links.title: swarm-ansible
links.description: Swarm-Ansible bootstraps a production-ready swarm cluster using ansible. Comes with tools to automate CI, help monitoring and traefik pre-configured for SSL certificates and simple-auth. Comes with a private registry and more!.

links.title: SwarmManagement
links.description: Swarm Management is a python application, installed with pip. The application makes it easy to manage a Docker Swarm by configuring a single yaml file describing which stacks to deploy, and which networks, configs or secrets to create.

links.title: Triton
links.description: :yen: Elastic container-native infrastructure.

links.title: Tsuru
links.description: Tsuru is an extensible and open source Platform as a Service software.

links.title: werf
links.description: Werf is a CI/CD tool for building Docker images efficiently and deploying them to Kubernetes using GitOps.

links.title: docker-custodian
links.description: Keep docker hosts tidy.

links.title: Docuum
links.description: Least recently used (LRU) eviction of Docker images.

links.title: docker-dns
links.description: Lightweight DNS forwarder for Docker containers, resolves container names with custom suffixes (e.g. `.docker`) on the host to simplify service discovery.

links.title: Flannel
links.description: Flannel is a virtual network that gives a subnet to each host for use with container runtimes.

links.title: netshoot
links.description: The netshoot container has a powerful set of networking tools to help troubleshoot Docker networking issues.

links.title: Pipework
links.description: Software-Defined Networking for Linux Containers, Pipework works with "plain" LXC containers, and with the awesome Docker.

links.title: registrator
links.description: Service registry bridge for Docker.

links.title: BunkerWeb
links.description: Open-source and next-gen Web Application Firewall (WAF).

links.title: caddy-docker-proxy
links.description: Caddy-based reverse proxy, configured with service or container labels.

links.title: caddy-docker-upstreams
links.description: Docker upstreams module for Caddy, configured with container labels.

links.title: Docker Dnsmasq Updater
links.description: Update a remote dnsmasq server with Docker container hostnames.

links.title: docker-flow-proxy
links.description: Reconfigures proxy every time a new service is deployed, or when a service is scaled.

links.title: Let's Encrypt Nginx-proxy Companion
links.description: A lightweight companion container for the nginx-proxy. It allow the creation/renewal of Let's Encrypt certificates automatically.

links.title: mesh-router
links.description: Free domain(nsl.sh) provider for Docker containers with automatic HTTPS routing. Uses Wireguard VPN to securely route subdomain requests across networks. Ideal for self-hosted NAS and cloud deployments.

links.title: OpenResty Manager
links.description: The easiest using, powerful and beautiful OpenResty Manager(Nginx Enhanced Version), open source alternative to OpenResty Edge.

links.title: Swarm Router
links.description: A zero config service name based router for docker swarm mode with a fresh and more secure approach.

links.title: Label Backup
links.description: A lightweight, Docker-aware backup agent that automatically discovers and backs up containerized databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis) based on Docker labels. Supports local storage and S3-compatible destinations with flexible scheduling via cron expressions.

links.title: portworx
links.description: :yen: Decentralized storage solution for persistent, shared and replicated volumes.

links.title: quobyte
links.description: :yen: Fully fault-tolerant distributed file system with a docker volume driver.

links.title: resq
links.description: Restic-powered Docker backups for volumes, databases, and .env files, with or without stopping containers. Works with local, SSH, or any S3 compatible storage.

links.title: ADRG
links.description: Dynamic Docker resource governor using cgroups v2 to manage system load.

links.title: AppDynamics
links.description: :yen: Docker Monitoring extension gathers metrics from the Docker Remote API, either using Unix Socket or TCP.

links.title: Autoheal
links.description: Monitor and restart unhealthy docker containers automatically.

links.title: Better Stack
links.description: :yen: A Docker-compatible observability stack that delivers log aggregation and uptime monitoring for containerized apps.

links.title: Datadog
links.description: :yen: Full-stack monitoring service with first-class Docker, Kubernetes, and Mesos support.

links.title: DLIA
links.description: DLIA is an AI-powered Docker log monitoring agent that uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to intelligently analyze container logs, detect anomalies, and provide contextual insights over time.

links.title: docker-exporter
links.description: Lightweight Prometheus exporter for Docker container metrics written in Rust. Correct cgroup v2 memory working set on ARM64 (Raspberry Pi 5), runs non-root with a read-only socket, ~7 MiB idle RAM.

links.title: Docker-Sentinel
links.description: Automated container updates with per-container policies, rollback safety, and a real-time web dashboard.

links.title: DockProbe
links.description: Lightweight Docker monitoring dashboard in a single container. Real-time metrics, 6 anomaly detection rules, Telegram alerts, and 16 automated security scans. Zero config, ~50MB RAM.

links.title: DockProc
links.description: I/O monitoring for containers on processlevel.

links.title: dockprom
links.description: Docker hosts and containers monitoring with Prometheus, Grafana, cAdvisor, NodeExporter and AlertManager.

links.title: Doku
links.description: Doku is a simple web-based application that allows you to monitor Docker disk usage.

links.title: Drydock
links.description: Container update monitoring with web dashboard, 23 registry providers, 20 notification triggers, and distributed agent architecture.

links.title: Dynatrace
links.description: :yen: Monitor containerized applications without installing agents or modifying your Run commands.

links.title: Grafana Docker Dashboard Template
links.description: A template for your Docker, Grafana and Prometheus stack.

links.title: InfraCanvas
links.description: Live visual map of containers, pods, volumes, and networks on any Linux server. Single binary, WebSocket-powered live updates.

links.title: Maintenant
links.description: Self-discovering infrastructure monitoring for Docker and Kubernetes. Auto-detects containers via labels, with endpoint monitoring, heartbeats, TLS certificates, resource metrics, update intelligence, and a built-in status page. Single binary with embedded SPA.

links.title: Middleware
links.description: :yen: Monitor Docker hosts, containers, logs, and application performance from a unified observability platform.

links.title: Site24x7
links.description: :yen: Docker Monitoring for DevOps and IT, SaaS Pay-per-Host model.

links.title: Sysdig Monitor
links.description: :yen: Software or SaaS service that monitors, alerts, and troubleshoots containers using system calls; container-specific features for Docker and Kubernetes.

links.title: Wiremap
links.description: A self-hosted visual Docker network topology explorer with real-time log streaming, live stats, embedded terminal, and container inspection.

links.title: Aqua Security
links.description: :yen: Securing container-based applications from Dev to Production on any platform.

links.title: buildcage
links.description: Restricts outbound network access during Docker builds to prevent supply chain attacks, working as a drop-in BuildKit remote driver for Docker Buildx, with ready-to-use GitHub Actions.

links.title: CetusGuard
links.description: CetusGuard is a tool that protects the Docker daemon socket by filtering calls to its API endpoints.

links.title: Checkov
links.description: Static analysis for infrastructure as code manifests (Terraform, Kubernetes, Cloudformation, Helm, Dockerfile, Kustomize) find security misconfiguration and fix them.

links.title: compose-lint
links.description: Lints Docker Compose files for security misconfigurations — privileged containers, unpinned images, Docker socket mounts, plaintext credentials — grounded in OWASP and the CIS Docker Benchmark.

links.title: container-explorer
links.description: Forensic utility to explore Docker and containerd container details from mounted disk images.

links.title: Deepfence Threat Mapper
links.description: Powerful runtime vulnerability scanner for kubernetes, virtual machines and serverless.

links.title: docker-bench-security
links.description: Script that checks for dozens of common best-practices around deploying Docker containers in production.

links.title: docker-socket-proxy
links.description: HAProxy-based fine-grained filter for the Docker API socket; widely used to expose a restricted socket to reverse proxies and homelab stacks.

links.title: KICS
links.description: An infrastructure-as-code scanning tool, find security vulnerabilities, compliance issues, and infrastructure misconfigurations early in the development cycle. Can be extended for additional policies.

links.title: Prisma Cloud
links.description: :yen: (Previously Twistlock Security Suite) detects vulnerabilities, hardens container images, and enforces security policies across the lifecycle of applications.

links.title: segspec
links.description: Extracts network dependencies from Docker Compose, Kubernetes manifests, Helm charts, and other config files to generate Kubernetes NetworkPolicies with evidence tracing.

links.title: Sysdig Falco
links.description: Sysdig Falco is an open source container security monitor. It can monitor application, container, host, and network activity and alert on unauthorized activity.

links.title: Sysdig Secure
links.description: :yen: Sysdig Secure addresses run-time security through behavioral monitoring and defense, and provides deep forensics based on open source Sysdig for incident response.

links.title: Trend Micro DeepSecurity
links.description: :yen: Trend Micro DeepSecurity offers runtime protection for container workloads and hosts as well as preruntime scanning of images to identify vulnerabilities, malware and content such as hardcoded secrets.

links.title: Docker DB Manager
links.description: Desktop app for managing Docker database containers with visual interface and one-click operations.

links.title: Docker Desktop
links.description: Official native app. Only for Windows and MacOS.

links.title: Simple Docker UI
links.description: Built on Electron.

links.title: Stevedore
links.description: Good Docker Desktop replacement for Windows. Both Linux and Windows Containers are supported. [slonopotamus](https://github.com/slonopotamus).

links.title: d4s
links.description: A fast, keyboard-driven terminal UI to manage Docker containers, Compose stacks, and Swarm services with the ergonomics of K9s.

links.title: dcinja
links.description: The powerful and smallest binary size of template engine for docker command line environment.

links.title: dctl
links.description: Dctl is a Cli tool that helps developers by allowing them to execute all docker compose commands anywhere in the terminal, and more.

links.title: docker pushrm
links.description: A Docker CLI plugin that lets you push the README.md file from the current directory to Docker Hub. Also supports Quay and Harbor.

links.title: docker-captain
links.description: A friendly CLI to manage multiple Docker Compose deployments with style — powered by Typer, Rich, questionary, and sh.

links.title: dockerfile-mode
links.description: An Emacs mode for handling Dockerfiles.

links.title: dockerfilegraph
links.description: Visualize your multi-stage Dockerfiles.

links.title: dockly
links.description: An interactive shell UI for managing Docker containers.

links.title: DockMate
links.description: Lightweight terminal-based Docker and Podman manager with a text-based user interface,.

links.title: DockSTARTer
links.description: DockSTARTer helps you get started with home server apps running in Docker.

links.title: DockTUI
links.description: Fast, zero-dependency terminal dashboard for Docker and Compose.

links.title: dockup
links.description: TUI to install, harden and maintain container runtimes: Docker Engine + Compose v2, NVIDIA Container Toolkit, Podman and Apple container, with a CIS-inspired security audit.

links.title: dprs
links.description: A developer-focused TUI for managing Docker containers with real-time log streaming and container management.

links.title: dry
links.description: An interactive CLI for Docker containers.

links.title: easydocker
links.description: A Terminal UI highly inpired by k9s levaraging beatiful BubbleTea graphics.

links.title: goManageDocker
links.description: TUI tool to view and manage your docker objects blazingly fast with sensible keybindings, also supports VIM navigation out of the box.

links.title: lazydocker
links.description: The lazier way to manage everything docker. A simple terminal UI for both docker and docker-compose, written in Go with the gocui library.

links.title: proco
links.description: Proco will help you to organise and manage Docker, Docker-Compose, Kubernetes projects of any complexity using simple YAML config files to shorten the route from finding your project to initialising it in your local environment.

links.title: scuba
links.description: Transparently use Docker containers to encapsulate software build environments,.

links.title: supdock
links.description: Allows for slightly more visual usage of Docker with an interactive prompt.

links.title: swarmcli
links.description: Swarm Management at the speed of thought — with real-time log streaming, instant shell access to containers, seamless port forwarding, and on-demand secret reveal capabilities, giving you full control over your Docker Swarm without breaking your flow.

links.title: tdocker
links.description: A `docker ps` replacement for everyday container operations.

links.title: wharf
links.description: A k9s-inspired TUI for Docker Compose with vim-style navigation, real-time CPU/MEM monitoring with braille charts, container file browser, SSH remote host support, and command mode.

links.title: Arcane
links.description: An easy and modern Docker management platform, built with everybody in mind.

links.title: CASA
links.description: Outsource the administration of a handful of containers to your co-workers,.

links.title: Container Web TTY
links.description: Connect your containers via a web-tty.

links.title: Docker Registry Browser
links.description: Web Interface for the Docker Registry HTTP API v2.

links.title: docker-swarm-visualizer
links.description: Visualizes Docker services on a Docker Swarm (for running demos).

links.title: dockge
links.description: Easy-to-use and reactive self-hosted docker compose.yaml stack-oriented manager.

links.title: Komodo
links.description: A tool to build and deploy software on many servers.

links.title: Portainer
links.description: A lightweight management UI for managing your Docker hosts or Docker Swarm clusters.

links.title: Swarmpit
links.description: Swarmpit provides simple and easy to use interface for your Docker Swarm cluster. You can manage your stacks, services, secrets, volumes, networks etc.

links.title: usulnet
links.description: A complete and modern Docker management platform designed for sysadmin, devops with enterprise grade tools, cve scanner, ssh, rdp on web and much more.

links.title: contajners
links.description: An idiomatic, data-driven, REPL friendly Clojure client for OCI container engines.

links.title: Docker Client for JVM
links.description: A Docker remote api client library for the JVM, written in Groovy.

links.title: Docker Client TypeScript
links.description: Docker API client for JavaScript, automatically generated from Swagger API definition from moby repository.

links.title: docker-controller-bot
links.description: Telegram bot to control docker containers.

links.title: docker-maven-plugin
links.description: A Maven plugin for running and creating Docker images.

links.title: Docker.DotNet
links.description: C#/.NET HTTP client for the Docker remote API.

links.title: Docker.Registry.DotNet
links.description: .NET (C#) Client Library for interacting with a Docker Registry API (v2).

links.title: dockerode
links.description: Docker Remote API node.js module.

links.title: go-dockerclient
links.description: Go HTTP client for the Docker remote API.

links.title: Gradle Docker plugin
links.description: A Docker remote api plugin for Gradle.

links.title: Portainer stack utils
links.description: Bash script to deploy/update/undeploy Docker stacks in a Portainer instance from a docker-compose yaml file.

links.title: Buddy
links.description: :yen: The best of Git, build & deployment tools combined into one powerful tool that supercharged our development.

links.title: Captain
links.description: Convert your Git workflow to Docker containers ready for Continuous Delivery.

links.title: CircleCI
links.description: :yen: Push or pull Docker images from your build environment, or build and run containers right on CircleCI.

links.title: CodeFresh
links.description: :yen: End-to-end build, test, and share for Docker applications, with automated testing.

links.title: ConcourseCI
links.description: :yen: Pipeline-oriented CI SaaS platform for DevOps teams.

links.title: Defang
links.description: Deploy Docker Compose to your favorite cloud in minutes.

links.title: Depot
links.description: :yen: Build Docker images fast, in the cloud. Blazing fast compute, automatic intelligent caching, and zero configuration.

links.title: Diun
links.description: Receive notifications when an image or repository is updated on a Docker registry.

links.title: dockcheck
links.description: A script checking updates for docker images without pulling then auto-update selected/all containers. With notifications, pruning and more.

links.title: Docker plugin for Jenkins
links.description: The aim of the docker plugin is to be able to use a docker host to dynamically provision a slave, run a single build, then tear-down that slave.

links.title: Gantry
links.description: Automatically update selected Docker swarm services.

links.title: GitLab Runner
links.description: GitLab has integrated CI to test, build and deploy your code with the use of GitLab runners.

links.title: Jaypore CI
links.description: Simple, very flexible, powerful CI / CD / automation system configured in Python. Offline and local first.

links.title: Kraken CI
links.description: Modern CI/CD, open-source, on-premise system that is highly scalable and focused on testing. One of its executors is Docker. Developed.

links.title: Screwdriver
links.description: :yen: Yahoo's OpenSource buildplatform designed for Continous Delivery.

links.title: Self Hosted Runner
links.description: Dockerized solution for setting up a self-hosted GitHub Actions runner with support for Linux, macOS, and Windows.

links.title: Semaphore CI
links.description: :yen: High-performance cloud CI that builds, tests and ships containers to production.

links.title: Skipper
links.description: Easily dockerize your Git repository.

links.title: Tekton CD
links.description: A cloud-native pipeline resource.

links.title: coder
links.description: Remote development machines powered by Terraform or Docker.

links.title: dde
links.description: Local development environment toolset based on Docker.

links.title: DIP
links.description: CLI utility for straightforward provisioning and interacting with an application configured by docker-compose.

links.title: EnvCLI
links.description: Replace your local installation of Node, Go, ... with project-specific docker containers.

links.title: HarborPilot
links.description: Automated multi-platform Docker image builder for embedded Linux development (RK3588, RV1126, RK3568). Features three-layer config inheritance, PORT_SLOT-based port allocation, and cross-version Ubuntu support (20.04/22.04/24.04).

links.title: Lando
links.description: Lando is for developers who want to quickly specify and painlessly spin up the services and tools needed to develop their projects.

links.title: uniget
links.description: Uni(versal)get, the installer and updater for container tools and beyond (formerly docker-setup).

links.title: Zsh-in-Docker
links.description: Install Zsh, Oh-My-Zsh and plugins inside a Docker container with one line!.

links.title: Apache OpenWhisk
links.description: A serverless, open source cloud platform that executes functions in response to events at any scale.

links.title: Koyeb
links.description: :yen: Koyeb is a developer-friendly serverless platform to deploy apps globally. Seamlessly run Docker containers, web apps, and APIs with git-based deployment, native autoscaling, a global edge network, and built-in service mesh and discovery.

links.title: OpenFaaS
links.description: A complete serverless functions framework for Docker and Kubernetes.

links.title: Container Structure Test
links.description: A framework to validate the structure of an image by checking the outputs of commands or the contents of the filesystem.

links.title: dgoss
links.description: A fast YAML based tool for validating docker containers.

links.title: Kurtosis
links.description: A composable build system for multi-container test environments that provides developers with: a powerful Python-like SDK for environment configuration, a compile-time validator to verify environment behavior & setup, and a runtime for environment execution, monitoring, & debugging capabilities.

links.title: Pumba
links.description: Chaos testing tool for Docker. Can be deployed on kubernetes and CoreOS cluster.

links.title: Hokusai
links.description: A Docker + Kubernetes CLI for application developers; used to containerize an application and to manage its lifecycle throughout development, testing, and release cycles. From [artsy](https://github.com/artsy).

links.title: Preevy
links.description: Preview environments for Docker and Docker Compose projects. Test your changes and get feedback from devs and non-devs (Product/Design) by deploying pull requests to the your cloud provider as part of your CI pipeline.

links.title: subuser
links.description: Makes it easy to securely and portably run graphical desktop applications in Docker.

links.title: udocker
links.description: A tool to execute simple docker containers in batch or interactive systems without root privileges.

links.title: Vagrant - Docker provider
links.description: Good starting point is [vagrant-docker-example](https://github.com/bubenkoff/vagrant-docker-example).

links.title: cdebug
links.description: Swiss-army knife for debugging running containers via ephemeral sidecars; works with Docker, containerd, and Kubernetes.

links.title: ckron
links.description: A cron-style job scheduler for docker,.

links.title: docker-gen
links.description: Generate files from docker container meta-data.

links.title: dockerize
links.description: Utility to simplify running applications in docker containers.

links.title: GoSu
links.description: Run this specific application as this specific user and get out of the pipeline (entrypoint script tool).

links.title: is-docker
links.description: Check if the process is running inside a Docker container.

links.title: microcheck
links.description: Lightweight health check utilities for Docker containers (75 KB instead of 9.3 MB for httpcheck versus cURL) in pure C - http(s), port checks, and parallel execution are included.

links.title: Ofelia
links.description: Ofelia is a modern and low footprint job scheduler for docker environments, built on Go. Ofelia aims to be a replacement for the old fashioned cron. Supports configuration from container labels and/or configuration files.

links.title: su-exec
links.description: This is a simple tool that will simply execute a program with different privileges. The program will be executed directly and not run as a child, like su and sudo does, which avoids TTY and signal issues. Why reinvent gosu? This does more or less exactly the same thing as gosu but it is only 10kb instead of 1.8MB.

links.title: supercronic
links.description: Crontab-compatible job runner, designed specifically to run in containers.

links.title: Bootstrapping Microservices
links.description: A practical and project-based guide to building applications with microservices, starts by building a Docker image for a single microservice and publishing it to a private container registry, finishes by deploying a complete microservices application to a production Kubernetes cluster.

links.title: Docker Curriculum
links.description: A comprehensive tutorial for getting started with Docker. Teaches how to use Docker and deploy dockerized apps on AWS with Elastic Beanstalk and Elastic Container Service.

links.title: Docker Documentation
links.description: the official documentation.

links.title: Docker for beginners
links.description: A tutorial for beginners who need to learn the basics of Docker—from "Hello world!" to basic interactions with containers, with simple explanations of the underlying concepts.

links.title: Docker Training
links.description: :yen:

links.title: Dockerlings
links.description: Learn docker from inside your terminal, with a modern TUI and bite sized exercises.

links.title: Learn Docker
links.description: step-by-step tutorial and more resources (video, articles, cheat sheets)

links.title: Learn Docker (Visually)
links.description: A beginner-focused high-level overview of all the major components of Docker and how they fit together. Lots of high-quality images, examples, and resources.

links.title: Play With Docker
links.description: PWD is a great way to get started with Docker from beginner to advanced users. Docker runs directly in your browser.

links.title: Practical Guide about Docker Commands in Spanish
Setting Python Development Environment with VScode and Docker
links.description: A step-by-step tutorial for setting up a dockerized Python development environment with VScode, Docker, and the Dev Container extension.

links.title: Docker on Windows behind a firewall
Docker Reference Architecture: Modernizing Traditional .NET Framework Applications
links.description: You will learn to identify the types of .NET Framework applications that are good candidates for containerization, the "lift-and-shift" approach to containerization.

Running a Legacy ASP.NET App in a Windows Container

links.description: :yen: Will help you to will Learn Docker containerization, running Docker containers, Image creation, Dockerfile, Docker orchestration, security best practices, and more through hands-on projects and case studies and helps to clear Docker Certified Associate.
